headline: Crafting digital
experiences & identities
that endure.
hero.description: Independent creative developer & designer building refined digital products, brand identities, and interactive experiences for visionary clients worldwide.

bio: I'm Octoguss — an independent creative developer and designer with a deep commitment to craft, clarity, and meaningful detail.

My work lives at the intersection of design and technology. I help brands and startups build digital presences that are not only beautiful but purposeful — systems that scale, experiences that resonate.
With a background spanning brand identity, interaction design, and front-end engineering, I bring a holistic perspective to every project — from initial strategy through to pixel-perfect execution.

services.name: Brand & Identity
services.desc: Visual identity systems, logo design, typography, color strategy, brand guidelines, and packaging — built to last and scale.

services.name: Web & Digital
services.desc: High-performance websites, interactive applications, and design systems. Clean code, thoughtful UX, and obsessive attention to detail.

services.name: Motion & Experience
services.desc: Animations, micro-interactions, immersive digital experiences, and creative direction that brings brands to life in motion.
